title: SYNTHETIC residential-FAR overlapping-window rule - early (effective up to 2024-06-01)
description: SYNTHETIC fixture (M4-T004 FH-2 integration): a residential_far rule with window (-inf, 2024-06-01). Paired with res-far-win-late (window [2024-01-01, +inf)) it overlaps on [2024-01-01, 2024-06-01). Used to prove the integration layer threads as_of_date so temporal SIMULTANEITY is judged: an as_of inside the overlap yields a conflict; outside it a single rule evaluates normally. Illustrative value; not a Verified determination.
